calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. CSR: Susan Lee, CSR #4280.

Robert Gates, Esq. appeared for and with the plaintiff Stuart M. During, ind. dba During Associated, was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default has been entered against the Defendant.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant 2550 Van Ness SF, LLc, a limited liability company; 2550 Van Ness SF Management, LLC, a limited liability company; HFZ Corp., a corporatio; HFZ Holdings, LLC, a limited liability company, for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $40,204.79
Pre-Judgment interest - $10,030.380
Attorneys' fees - $1,000.00
Costs - $560.30
Total judgment in the amount of $51,795.89
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2011 Continued To Sep-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Continued To Jul-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
